# David Orlando Miranda (DÆV)

> Full Stack Developer from Colombia with 4+ years of experience building fast,
> scalable web products from idea to deployment. Specializes in React, Next.js,
> Node.js, NestJS and TypeScript. Available for freelance and full-time work,
> remote, working in Spanish and English.

## Summary

- Name: David Orlando Miranda
- Alias / brand: DÆV
- Role: Full Stack Developer
- Location: Colombia (remote-friendly, works across the Americas and Europe)
- Experience: 4+ years, 10+ projects, 3 companies
- Languages: Spanish (native), English (professional)
- Status: Available for work

## Skills

- Frontend: React, Next.js, Vue, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML, CSS
- Backend: Node.js, NestJS, Express, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, GraphQL, REST APIs
- Tools & DevOps: Git, Docker, NX, Redux, Jest, Vercel, GitHub Actions
